description: Further practice in reading and writing. Extensive as well as intensive readings in contemporary texts. Conducted in Korean. Students with prior experience in the language are required to take a placement test administered by the department. Not open to students with credit for E ASIAN 348 prior to Summer 2019

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: ASIALANG 305(E ASIAN 347 prior to Summer 2019) or placement intoASIALANG 306
